content: Symbol has low volatility and stable API data feeds
Market data feeds never become stale during trading hours
KYC checks only apply to new customers
note: SINGLE-CONDITION CONFLICT: CPL-KYC applies to all transactions

content: High volatility (FIN-058) during market open (TM-OPEN) is normal
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: FIN-058 + TM-OPEN needs limit orders only

content: Stale data (FIN-059) for algorithmic orders (ORD-ALG) doesn't matter
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: FIN-059 + ORD-ALG needs alternative feed

content: Large orders (ORD-LRG) during volatility (FIN-058) execute at market
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: ORD-LRG + FIN-058 needs TWAP/VWAP

content: AML compliance (CPL-AML) for block orders (ORD-BLK) is simpler
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: CPL-AML + ORD-BLK needs full audit trail

content: Express timing (TM-EXPR) with stale data (FIN-059) retries automatically
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: TM-EXPR + FIN-059 needs manual feed switch

content: After-hours (TM-AFTER) with iceberg orders (ORD-ICE) is safe
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: TM-AFTER + ORD-ICE has high slippage risk

content: Primary feed is always reliable; no backup needed
note: MISLEADING: Exchanges can have outages, need alternatives
